=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:14-6:29) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(a, b) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"arrowWithParams\")"

[D2] (13:14-13:42) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(a, b) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionExpressionWithParams\")"

[D3] (20:17-20:46) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fnUntraced(function*(a, b) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced"
  Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)"
  Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionDeclarationWithParams\")"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});

export const functionExpressionWithParams = function(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationWithParams(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}


=== [D1] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = Effect.fn(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});

export const functionExpressionWithParams = function(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationWithParams(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}


=== [D1] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"arrowWithParams\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = Effect.fn("arrowWithParams")(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});

export const functionExpressionWithParams = function(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export function functionDeclarationWithParams(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = (a: number, b: string) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionExpressionWithParams = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});

export function functionDeclarationWithParams(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}


=== [D2] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = (a: number, b: string) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionExpressionWithParams = Effect.fn(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});

export function functionDeclarationWithParams(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}


=== [D2] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionExpressionWithParams\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = (a: number, b: string) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionExpressionWithParams = Effect.fn("functionExpressionWithParams")(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});

export function functionDeclarationWithParams(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fnUntraced" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = (a: number, b: string) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionExpressionWithParams = function(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionDeclarationWithParams = Effect.fnUntraced(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});


=== [D3] Fix 3: "Convert to Effect.fn (no span)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = (a: number, b: string) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionExpressionWithParams = function(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionDeclarationWithParams = Effect.fn(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});


=== [D3] Fix 4: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"functionDeclarationWithParams\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_params.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// These cases are okay and should trigger the diagnostic.
// Functions with parameters can be converted to Effect.fn.

export const arrowWithParams = (a: number, b: string) => {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionExpressionWithParams = function(a: number, b: string) {
  return Effect.gen(function*() {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a)
    return b
  })
}

export const functionDeclarationWithParams = Effect.fn("functionDeclarationWithParams")(function* (a: number, b: string) {
    yield* Effect.succeed(a);
    return b;
});
